exits.notes: Only cardinal directions (north, south, east, west) and up/down are supported. Diagonal directions are not allowed.

items.description: Optional ground items seeded into the room when the world or zone initializes. Each entry should include template_id and optional count.

keyword_actions.description: Supports standard keyword action fields plus optional debug_only boolean to include an action only when gameplay.debug_mode is enabled in server settings.

room_objects.description: Supports optional debug_only boolean to include an object only when gameplay.debug_mode is enabled in server settings.

exit_details.description: Optional exit metadata/state. Supports close/open and lock/unlock behavior, including lock_id, can_lock, is_closed, is_locked, and optional message overrides. Grammar defaults are generated from the exit name/type/direction when omitted.
